response.global_summary: The video shows a 3D VTuber, identified by the hashtag #森はしの生誕祭2026 as Morihashi, performing a song titled "ええじゃないか" (Eejanaika) which was composed by Masa. The performance is followed by a short talk segment with the audience.

The music ends, and the VTuber Morihashi interacts with the audience in a post-performance chat.
